preconditions: I can only initiate an appointment case A if it is not the case that A is an active case and it is not the case that the case is confirmed for A
effects: Once I initiate an appointment case A, it is the case that A is an active case

reserve_clinic_slot.description: reserve a clinic slot B for an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinic slot B for an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and B is available at the clinic and the appointment case A is eligible for the clinic slot B
I can only reserve a clinic slot B for an appointment case A if it is not the case that A has a reservation
effects: Once I reserve a clinic slot B for an appointment case A, it is the case that A is assigned to B and A has a reservation
Once I reserve a clinic slot B for an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available at the clinic

release_clinic_reservation.description: release reservation of a clinic slot B for an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a clinic slot B for an appointment case A if it is the case that A is assigned to B
I can only release reservation of a clinic slot B for an appointment case A if it is not the case that a visit instance is created for A and it is not the case that preparation is verified for A
effects: Once I release reservation of a clinic slot B for an appointment case A, it is the case that B is available at the clinic

Once I release reservation of a clinic slot B for an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to B and it is not the case anymore that A has a reservation and it is not the case anymore that the endpoint for A is activated and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for the admin and it is not the case anymore that the support staff assigned flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that preparation is finalized for A and it is not the case anymore that A has an auxiliary requirement flag

claim_telehealth_endpoint.description: claim a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only claim a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and B is available
effects: Once I claim a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A, it is the case that A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B
Once I claim a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_telehealth_endpoint.description: release a telehealth endpoint B from an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only release a telehealth endpoint B from an appointment case A if it is the case that A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B
effects: Once I release a telehealth endpoint B from an appointment case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a telehealth endpoint B from an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B

activate_endpoint.description: activate a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only activate a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and A has a reservation and A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B
I can only activate a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A if it is not the case that the endpoint for A is activated
effects: Once I activate a telehealth endpoint B for an appointment case A, it is the case that the endpoint for A is activated

assign_support_staff_and_activate_endpoi.description: assign a support staff B and activate endpoint for an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only assign a support staff B and activate endpoint for an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and A has a reservation and B is available
I can only assign a support staff B and activate endpoint for an appointment case A if it is not the case that the endpoint for A is activated
effects: Once I assign a support staff B and activate endpoint for an appointment case A, it is the case that the endpoint for A is activated and the support staff assigned flag is set for A
Once I assign a support staff B and activate endpoint for an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

apply_consent_document.description: apply a consent document C to an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B
preconditions: I can only apply a consent document C to an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B if it is the case that the endpoint for A is activated and A has a reservation and A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B and the consent document C is available
I can only apply a consent document C to an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B if it is not the case that A is ready for the admin
effects: Once I apply a consent document C to an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B, it is the case that A is ready for the admin
Once I apply a consent document C to an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B, it is not the case anymore that the support staff assigned flag is set for A

apply_service_profile_documentation.description: apply a service profile B documentation to an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only apply a service profile B documentation to an appointment case A if it is the case that A has a reservation and A has the service profile B confirmed
I can only apply a service profile B documentation to an appointment case A if it is not the case that A is ready for the admin
effects: Once I apply a service profile B documentation to an appointment case A, it is the case that A is ready for the admin
Once I apply a service profile B documentation to an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that the support staff assigned flag is set for A

assign_clinician.description: assign a clinician B to an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only assign a clinician B to an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and B is available and the appointment case A is eligible for the clinician B
effects: Once I assign a clinician B to an appointment case A, it is the case that A is assigned to clinician B
Once I assign a clinician B to an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_clinician_assignment.description: release a clinician B from an appointment case A assignment
preconditions: I can only release a clinician B from an appointment case A assignment if it is the case that A is assigned to clinician B
effects: Once I release a clinician B from an appointment case A assignment, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinician B from an appointment case A assignment, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to clinician B

reserve_procedure_room.description: reserve a procedure room B for an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a procedure room B for an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and B is available and the appointment case A is eligible for the procedure room B
effects: Once I reserve a procedure room B for an appointment case A, it is the case that A is assigned to room B
Once I reserve a procedure room B for an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_procedure_room.description: release a procedure room B from an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only release a procedure room B from an appointment case A if it is the case that A is assigned to room B
effects: Once I release a procedure room B from an appointment case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a procedure room B from an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to room B

assign_equipment.description: assign a medical equipment B to an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only assign a medical equipment B to an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and B is available and the appointment case A is eligible for the medical equipment B
effects: Once I assign a medical equipment B to an appointment case A, it is the case that A is assigned to equipment B
Once I assign a medical equipment B to an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_equipment.description: release a medical equipment B from an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only release a medical equipment B from an appointment case A if it is the case that A is assigned to equipment B
effects: Once I release a medical equipment B from an appointment case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a medical equipment B from an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to equipment B

assign_lab_resource.description: assign a lab resource B to an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only assign a lab resource B to an appointment case A if it is the case that A is an active case and the lab resource B is available and the appointment case A is eligible for the lab resource B
effects: Once I assign a lab resource B to an appointment case A, it is the case that A is assigned to lab resource B
Once I assign a lab resource B to an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that the lab resource B is available

release_lab_resource.description: release a lab resource B from an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only release a lab resource B from an appointment case A if it is the case that A is assigned to lab resource B
effects: Once I release a lab resource B from an appointment case A, it is the case that the lab resource B is available
Once I release a lab resource B from an appointment case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to lab resource B

create_visit_instance.description: create visit instance for an appointment case A with a clinician C in a procedure room D during an appointment time band B
preconditions: I can only create visit instance for an appointment case A with a clinician C in a procedure room D during an appointment time band B if it is the case that A has a reservation and A is assigned to clinician C and A is assigned to room D and B is available for an appointment and the appointment case A is eligible for the appointment time band B
I can only create visit instance for an appointment case A with a clinician C in a procedure room D during an appointment time band B if it is not the case that a visit instance is created for A
effects: Once I create visit instance for an appointment case A with a clinician C in a procedure room D during an appointment time band B, it is the case that A is scheduled for the time band B and a visit instance is created for A
Once I create visit instance for an appointment case A with a clinician C in a procedure room D during an appointment time band B, it is not the case anymore that B is available for an appointment

create_visit_instance_with_diagnostics.description: create visit instance with diagnostics for an appointment case A using a medical equipment C during an appointment time band B in a diagnostic slot D
preconditions: I can only create visit instance with diagnostics for an appointment case A using a medical equipment C during an appointment time band B in a diagnostic slot D if it is the case that A has a reservation and A is assigned to equipment C and the diagnostic slot D is available and B is available for an appointment and the appointment case A is eligible for the appointment time band B and the appointment case A is eligible for the diagnostic slot D

I can only create visit instance with diagnostics for an appointment case A using a medical equipment C during an appointment time band B in a diagnostic slot D if it is not the case that a visit instance is created for A
effects: Once I create visit instance with diagnostics for an appointment case A using a medical equipment C during an appointment time band B in a diagnostic slot D, it is the case that A is scheduled for the time band B and a visit instance is created for A and A has an auxiliary requirement flag and the support staff assigned flag is set for A

Once I create visit instance with diagnostics for an appointment case A using a medical equipment C during an appointment time band B in a diagnostic slot D, it is not the case anymore that B is available for an appointment and it is not the case anymore that the diagnostic slot D is available

perform_pre_visit_checks.description: perform pre visit checks for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C
preconditions: I can only perform pre visit checks for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C if it is the case that a visit instance is created for A and A has an auxiliary requirement flag and A is assigned to clinician B and A is assigned to room C
effects: Once I perform pre visit checks for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C, it is not the case anymore that A has an auxiliary requirement flag and it is not the case anymore that the support staff assigned flag is set for A

finalize_preparation.description: finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C using a patient transport option D
preconditions: I can only finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C using a patient transport option D if it is the case that A is ready for the admin and a visit instance is created for A and A is assigned to clinician B and A is assigned to room C and the appointment case A is eligible for the patient transport option D

I can only finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C using a patient transport option D if it is not the case that the support staff assigned flag is set for A and it is not the case that preparation is verified for A
effects: Once I finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C using a patient transport option D, it is the case that preparation is verified for A

finalize_preparation_with_lab.description: finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a medical equipment B and a lab resource C using a visit mode option D
preconditions: I can only finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a medical equipment B and a lab resource C using a visit mode option D if it is the case that A is ready for the admin and a visit instance is created for A and A is assigned to equipment B and A is assigned to lab resource C and the appointment case A is eligible for the patient transport option D
I can only finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a medical equipment B and a lab resource C using a visit mode option D if it is not the case that preparation is verified for A
effects: Once I finalize preparation for an appointment case A with a medical equipment B and a lab resource C using a visit mode option D, it is the case that preparation is verified for A and the support staff assigned flag is set for A

complete_preparation.description: complete preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C
preconditions: I can only complete preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C if it is the case that preparation is verified for A and the support staff assigned flag is set for A and A is assigned to clinician B and A is assigned to room C
effects: Once I complete preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C, it is the case that preparation is finalized for A

Once I complete preparation for an appointment case A with a clinician B in a procedure room C, it is not the case anymore that the support staff assigned flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for the admin and it is not the case anymore that A has an auxiliary requirement flag

reapply_admin_checks.description: reapply admin checks for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C
preconditions: I can only reapply admin checks for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C if it is the case that preparation is finalized for A and preparation is verified for A and A has a reservation and A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B and the consent document C is available
I can only reapply admin checks for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C if it is not the case that A is ready for the admin
effects: Once I reapply admin checks for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C, it is the case that A is ready for the admin

confirm_endpoint_resource.description: confirm endpoint resource for an appointment case A with a telehealth endpoint B
preconditions: I can only confirm endpoint resource for an appointment case A with a telehealth endpoint B if it is the case that preparation is verified for A and A is ready for the admin and A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B

I can only confirm endpoint resource for an appointment case A with a telehealth endpoint B if it is not the case that the support staff assigned flag is set for A and it is not the case that resources are confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm endpoint resource for an appointment case A with a telehealth endpoint B, it is the case that resources are confirmed for A

confirm_support_staff_assignment.description: confirm support staff assignment for an appointment case A with a support staff B
preconditions: I can only confirm support staff assignment for an appointment case A with a support staff B if it is the case that preparation is verified for A and A is ready for the admin and B is available

I can only confirm support staff assignment for an appointment case A with a support staff B if it is not the case that the support staff assigned flag is set for A and it is not the case that resources are confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm support staff assignment for an appointment case A with a support staff B, it is the case that resources are confirmed for A
Once I confirm support staff assignment for an appointment case A with a support staff B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

confirm_service_profile_assignment.description: confirm service profile assignment for an appointment case A with a service profile B
preconditions: I can only confirm service profile assignment for an appointment case A with a service profile B if it is the case that resources are confirmed for A and the service profile B is available and A is eligible for follow up service profile B
effects: Once I confirm service profile assignment for an appointment case A with a service profile B, it is the case that the appointment case A is assigned the service profile B
Once I confirm service profile assignment for an appointment case A with a service profile B, it is not the case anymore that the service profile B is available

confirm_service_profile_from_followup.description: confirm service profile from follow up for a new patient case A using a scheduled follow up case B with a service profile C
preconditions: I can only confirm service profile from follow up for a new patient case A using a scheduled follow up case B with a service profile C if it is the case that A is an active case and A is a new patient case and A is eligible for the service profile C and the appointment case B is assigned the service profile C
I can only confirm service profile from follow up for a new patient case A using a scheduled follow up case B with a service profile C if it is not the case that A has the service profile C confirmed
effects: Once I confirm service profile from follow up for a new patient case A using a scheduled follow up case B with a service profile C, it is the case that A has the service profile C confirmed

verify_administrative_documents.description: verify administrative documents for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C
preconditions: I can only verify administrative documents for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C if it is the case that A is an active case and A is a new patient case and A is ready for the admin and resources are confirmed for A and A is assigned to the telehealth endpoint B and the consent document C is available
I can only verify administrative documents for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C if it is not the case that the documentation for A is verified
effects: Once I verify administrative documents for an appointment case A using a telehealth endpoint B with a consent document C, it is the case that the documentation for A is verified

finalize_case_confirmation_followup.description: finalize case confirmation for follow up an appointment case A
preconditions: I can only finalize case confirmation for follow up an appointment case A if it is the case that A is a follow up case and A is an active case and A has a reservation and a visit instance is created for A and preparation is verified for A and resources are confirmed for A and A is ready for the admin
I can only finalize case confirmation for follow up an appointment case A if it is not the case that the case is confirmed for A
effects: Once I finalize case confirmation for follow up an appointment case A, it is the case that the case is confirmed for A

finalize_case_confirmation_with_service_.description: finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with a service profile B
preconditions: I can only finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with a service profile B if it is the case that A is a new patient case and A is an active case and A has a reservation and a visit instance is created for A and preparation is verified for A and resources are confirmed for A and A is ready for the admin and A has the service profile B confirmed
I can only finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with a service profile B if it is not the case that the case is confirmed for A
effects: Once I finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with a service profile B, it is the case that the case is confirmed for A

finalize_case_confirmation_documented.description: finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with verified documentation
preconditions: I can only finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with verified documentation if it is the case that A is a new patient case and A is an active case and A has a reservation and a visit instance is created for A and preparation is verified for A and resources are confirmed for A and A is ready for the admin and the documentation for A is verified
I can only finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with verified documentation if it is not the case that the case is confirmed for A
effects: Once I finalize case confirmation for an appointment case A with verified documentation, it is the case that the case is confirmed for A

action_nl_templates.reserve_clinic_slot: reserve clinic slot {?clinic_slot} for appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_clinic_reservation: release reservation of clinic slot {?clinic_slot} for appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.claim_telehealth_endpoint: claim telehealth endpoint {?telehealth_endpoint} for appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_telehealth_endpoint: release telehealth endpoint {?telehealth_endpoint} from appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.activate_endpoint: activate telehealth endpoint {?telehealth_endpoint} for appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_support_staff_and_activate_endpoi: assign support staff {?support_staff} and activate endpoint for appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_consent_document: apply consent document {?consent_document} to appointment case {?appointment_case} using telehealth endpoint {?telehealth_endpoint}
action_nl_templates.apply_service_profile_documentation: apply service profile {?service_profile} documentation to appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_clinician_assignment: release clinician {?clinician} from appointment case {?appointment_case} assignment
action_nl_templates.reserve_procedure_room: reserve procedure room {?procedure_room} for appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_procedure_room: release procedure room {?procedure_room} from appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_equipment: assign medical equipment {?medical_equipment} to appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_equipment: release medical equipment {?medical_equipment} from appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_lab_resource: assign lab resource {?lab_resource} to appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_lab_resource: release lab resource {?lab_resource} from appointment case {?appointment_case}
action_nl_templates.create_visit_instance: create visit instance for appointment case {?appointment_case} with clinician {?clinician} in procedure room {?procedure_room} during appointment time band {?appointment_time_band}
action_nl_templates.create_visit_instance_with_diagnostics: create visit instance with diagnostics for appointment case {?appointment_case} using medical equipment {?medical_equipment} during appointment time band {?appointment_time_band} in diagnostic slot {?diagnostic_slot}
action_nl_templates.perform_pre_visit_checks: perform pre-visit checks for appointment case {?appointment_case} with clinician {?clinician} in procedure room {?procedure_room}
action_nl_templates.finalize_preparation: finalize preparation for appointment case {?appointment_case} with clinician {?clinician} in procedure room {?procedure_room} using patient transport option {?patient_transport_option}
action_nl_templates.finalize_preparation_with_lab: finalize preparation for appointment case {?appointment_case} with medical equipment {?medical_equipment} and lab resource {?lab_resource} using visit mode option {?visit_mode_option}
action_nl_templates.complete_preparation: complete preparation for appointment case {?appointment_case} with clinician {?clinician} in procedure room {?procedure_room}
action_nl_templates.reapply_admin_checks: reapply admin checks for appointment case {?appointment_case} using telehealth endpoint {?telehealth_endpoint} with consent document {?consent_document}
action_nl_templates.confirm_endpoint_resource: confirm endpoint resource for appointment case {?appointment_case} with telehealth endpoint {?telehealth_endpoint}

action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_confirmation_followup: finalize case confirmation for follow-up an appointment case {?appointment_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a appointment case or a clinic slot or a appointment time band or a procedure room or a clinician or a medical equipment or a telehealth endpoint or a support staff or a service profile or a consent document or a diagnostic slot or a lab resource or a logistics option is also a object
Everything that is a patient transport option or a visit mode option is also a logistics option
Everything that is a scheduled followup case or a new patient case is also a appointment case
